title: FoodSaver FFC026X Preserve & Marinate Vacuum Containers | 700 ml, 1.2 L & 1.8 L | Airtight BPA-Free Food Containers | Leak-Proof | Dishwasher-Safe | 3 Count, Transparent / Black
features: Storage: keeps food fresh longer in the fridge, freezer or cupboard thanks to the airtight seal; compatible with all machines FoodSaver (sold separately)
Money saving: preserves freshness to reduce food waste, helping you save money on your weekly shopping bill.
Marinade: Add delicious flavor to meat, fish, and vegetables in just 12 minutes. Save time and energy in the kitchen
Airtight and long-lasting seal: The powerful seal keeps food fresh, with a vacuum indicator in the lid to indicate when a vacuum has been achieved.
Stackable and stackable: the freshness boxes are easily interlocked and stacked to save space and keep your kitchen organized.
Durable and easy to use: Tritan freshness boxes are resistant to cracks and chips, stains and odors; flexible lid with tabs for easy opening
More cool features: the freshness boxes are vacuum-tight and BPA-free. They are dishwasher and microwave compatible
description: From the manufacturer More Great Features The Vacuum Indicator in the lid indents when an airtight seal has been achieved, so you know your food will stay fresh. Containers easily nest and stack to save space and keep your kitchen organised. Flexible lids with handy tabs on each side offer hassle-free opening and closing. Shatter- and crack-resistant Tritan is also stain- and odour-resistant. The container and lid are dishwasher-safe, plus the container is safe for reheating in the microwave.
